title: Department Manager Vacancy at MedPlus - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at MedPlus - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
MedPlus is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MedPlus:
MedPlus is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MedPlus!
